name: scratch
description: Low-friction quick-capture scratch notes. Per-day sub-folders under spice/scratch/YYYY/MM-MMMM/YYYY-MM-DD/. v0.2.0 redesign: nav-button opens-or-creates today's day-hub Scratch-Day-YYYY-MM-DD.md (collision-free with daily note); day-hub embeds ScratchNewButton (helper using customJS.AccentButton) for timestamped Scratch-YYYY-MM-DD-HH-mm.md siblings; ScratchHubCards target path fixed. v0.2.1 patch: (a) Scratch Day Hub.md ScratchDayList args wrapped in array (customjs-guard requires Array); (b) nav-button icon set to 'scratch' (new ICONS entry in nav-buttons@2.6.1). v0.2.2 patch: (a) frontmatter date values now quoted (Obsidian auto-parses unquoted YYYY-MM-DD to Date objects, broke dv.current().day === string equality); (b) ScratchDayList + new ScratchDayActions helpers normalize day across string/Date/Luxon via _coerceDay shim; (c) Scratch Day Hub.md replaces stacked ScratchNewButton + markdown Hub link with single ScratchDayActions helper that renders + New Scratch and Hub buttons inline below the nav row. v0.3.0 MINOR: migrate create flow to entity-create@0.1.0; delete legacy helpers/scratch-new-button.js (unreferenced since v0.2.2); trim ScratchDayActions to Hub-button-only (newScratch + _openTitleDialog + _buildScratchBody removed); Scratch Day Hub.md gains <!-- entity-create:scratch --> marker adjacent to ScratchDayActions block; new_entity_buttons[] entry with Path C body_template treatment (body_template dropped — Scratch.md uses Templater <%* %> syntax incompatible with entity-create; inline_body carries SpaceNavButtons + ScratchLeafActions dataviewjs blocks); {{current_file.frontmatter.day}} substitution token exercises schema extension #2 (day-hub frontmatter seeds per-scratch folder + filename). v0.4.1 PATCH (v0.66.2): BUGFIX new_entity_buttons[].frontmatter_template was missing `title: {{prompts.title}}` — the dialog collected the title prompt but discarded it. ScratchDayList (day-hub cards) + SpaceDailyDashboard activity panel (via _resolveTitle's p.title branch) both read p.title from frontmatter as the primary title source; with the field unwired, every scratch displayed as its timestamp filename. The fix is purely declarative — one new line in frontmatter_template; empty prompt now lands as `title: ""` which the resolvers correctly fall through.

new_entity_buttons.label: + New Scratch
new_entity_buttons.inline_body:

await dv.view("ranch/views/customjs-guard", { class: "SpaceNavButtons" });
